title: Admin logout ends the session and blocks dashboard access
description: Verifies an authenticated admin can log out, returns to the public site, and then cannot access the admin dashboard afterward.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Navigate to /logout
Navigate to /admin/dashboard
Verify the user is blocked from the admin dashboard and is prompted to authenticate

title: Browse village profile pages from home
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate from the home page through the profile overview, vision & mission, and organization structure pages with content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the profile overview page
Click the navigation link to the vision and mission page
Click the navigation link to the organization structure page
Verify organization structure content is displayed

title: Access news listing from the main navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the news listing page via normal site navigation and see a list of articles.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the news listing page
Verify a list of news articles is displayed

title: Access gallery listing from the main navigation
description: Verifies a visitor can reach the gallery listing page via normal site navigation and see a list of gallery items.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the gallery listing page
Verify a list of gallery items is displayed

title: Admin can sign in and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies an internal admin can sign in and land on the admin dashboard with protected dashboard content visible.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the navigation link to the admin dashboard
Verify admin dashboard content is displayed

title: Read a news article and return to the listing
description: Verifies a visitor can open the news listing, read an article detail page, and navigate back to the listing successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the news listing page
Click a news article from the list to open its detail page
Press Backspace
Verify the news listing is displayed

title: View a gallery item detail with content rendered
description: Verifies a visitor can open the gallery listing, select an item, and view the gallery detail page with its content displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the gallery listing page
Click a gallery item from the list to open its detail page
Verify gallery item details are displayed
Verify gallery images or media content are displayed

title: Open profile overview page from home
description: Verifies a visitor can navigate to the profile overview page and see village profile information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the profile overview page
Verify profile overview content is displayed

title: Submit a valid contact message successfully
description: Verifies a visitor can submit the contact form with valid required fields and sees a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the contact page
Fill a valid name into the name field
Fill a valid email into the email field
Fill a message into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Contact form validation shows errors for missing required fields
description: Verifies submitting the contact form with missing required fields shows field-level validation feedback and does not submit successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to /kontak
Submit the contact form
Verify field-level validation errors are displayed

title: Login rejects invalid credentials
description: Verifies submitting the login form with an incorrect password shows an authentication failure message and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username or email field with invalid-user@example.com
Fill in the password field with wrong-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication failure message is visible

title: Guest cannot open admin news management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access /admin/berita directly and is redirected to an authentication flow or blocked from admin content.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/berita
Verify admin news management content is not visible to guest users

title: Guest cannot open admin gallery management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access /admin/galeri directly and is redirected to login or prevented from viewing admin controls.

steps.description: Navigate to /admin/galeri
Verify admin gallery management content is not visible to guest users

title: Footer navigation links open expected public pages
description: Verifies key footer links (Beranda, Profil, Berita, Galeri, Kontak) are present and navigate to their expected pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to footer and click the footer link to /berita
Verify the news page is displayed
Navigate back to / and click the footer link to /galeri
Verify the gallery page is displayed
Navigate back to / and click the footer link to /kontak
Verify the contact page is displayed

title: Invalid news slug redirects to news listing
description: Verifies opening an invalid news detail URL does not crash and redirects visitors back to the news listing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /berita/slug-tidak-valid-123
Verify the user is on the /berita listing page

title: Invalid gallery detail URL redirects to gallery listing
description: Verifies opening an invalid gallery detail URL redirects visitors to the gallery listing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /galeri/id-tidak-valid
Verify the user is on the /galeri listing page

title: Login form shows validation when submitted empty
description: Verifies the login form displays validation/error feedback when submitted with empty required fields.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Submit the login form without filling any field
Verify validation or error feedback is visible

title: Home page WhatsApp contact entry is clickable
description: Verifies the floating or visible WhatsApp contact link points to a valid wa.me URL when present on the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify at least one WhatsApp contact link with wa.me href is visible

title: Guest cannot open admin dashboard route
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production admin dashboard directly.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/dashboard
Verify admin dashboard content is not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin carousel management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production carousel management page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/carousel
Verify carousel admin controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin statistics management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production statistics management page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/statistik
Verify statistics admin controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin contact management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production contact management page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/kontak
Verify contact management controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin settings page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production settings page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/pengaturan
Verify settings form and save controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin profile management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production village profile management page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/profil
Verify profile management controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin users management page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production user management page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/users
Verify user management controls are not visible to guests

title: Guest cannot open admin account profile page
description: Verifies a non-authenticated visitor cannot access the production account profile page.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/profile
Verify account update controls are not visible to guests

title: Admin berita CRUD form readiness from listing
description: Verifies production admin berita module exposes list, create form, and edit affordances required for CRUD workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/berita
Verify berita listing area is visible
Verify there is an action to add publication and at least one edit or delete action

title: Admin galeri CRUD form readiness from listing
description: Verifies production admin galeri module exposes list, create form, and edit or delete affordances for CRUD workflows.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/galeri
Verify galeri management form and media list are visible
Verify edit and delete actions are present for media items

title: Admin carousel CRUD page accessibility
description: Verifies production carousel management listing and create route are accessible for CRUD operations.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/carousel
Verify carousel listing is visible
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/carousel/create
Verify carousel create form is visible

title: Admin statistik CRUD page accessibility
description: Verifies production statistik management listing and create route are accessible for CRUD operations.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/statistik
Verify statistik listing is visible
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/statistik/create
Verify statistik create form is visible

title: Admin users CRUD page accessibility
description: Verifies production users management listing and create route are accessible for CRUD operations.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/users
Verify users listing is visible
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/users/create
Verify users create form is visible

title: Admin kontak management actions visibility
description: Verifies production contact management page shows operational actions for status update and deletion flows.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/admin/kontak
Verify contact entries or empty-state management section is visible
Verify there are controls to view detail and perform status or delete actions when data exists

title: Public profile slug page accessibility
description: Verifies a profile detail slug page is reachable from the production profile listing.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/profil
Click one profile detail link if available
Verify profile detail content is displayed

title: Public navigation access for all primary pages
description: Verifies production primary public pages are reachable: home, profile, news, gallery, contact, and login.

steps.description: Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/profil
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/berita
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/galeri
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/kontak
Navigate to https://munyepirak.wuaze.com/login
Verify each page loads expected core heading or section
